store_headline: Agency WordPress Theme with Portfolio and Job Board
store_subheadline: Portfolio, team profiles, and job board for creative agencies, designers, and illustrators
features: Portfolio custom post type with filterable masonry and grid layouts
Artist/Team member profiles linked to portfolio work via taxonomy system
Job board with career listings for talent recruitment
Advanced scrolling animations and cinematic page transitions
Built with Elementor page builder for drag-and-drop editing
Wolf Core plugin with custom agency-focused widgets and elements
WooCommerce integration for selling services or digital products
Client logo and testimonial showcase sections
Video background support for dynamic hero headers
One-click demo import with complete agency setups
selling_points: The only catalog theme built specifically for multi-format creators — audio, video, streams, and merch
Creator photography grid hero signals 'built for your world' the moment a podcaster lands on the preview
Episode archive system built for a growing back-catalogue without the workarounds creators typically patch together
Elementor-powered for creators who update their own site between uploads — no developer dependency required
WooCommerce for merch, digital downloads, and exclusive content — revenue streams beyond ad income
Event listings for live streams, recording sessions, and meetups — the full creator calendar in one place
Dark wordmark identity positions a creator as a media brand, not just a hobbyist with a blog
key_benefits: Central hub for podcasts, video archives, streams, and merch
Purpose-built creator design — not retrofitted from a magazine template
Polished media-brand identity that attracts sponsorship and collaboration inquiries
Manage live-stream schedule, episode archive, and merch store from one dashboard
Dark wordmark aesthetic that reads as editorial and press-worthy
Convert passive subscribers into paying customers with merch and digital products
Centralized hub that doubles as press kit, store, and content archive

testimonials.text: Very well coded. 5 stars for the developer and support.
testimonials.author: gianniskataras

testimonials.text: Working with Constantin at Wolfthemes has been truly fantastic. They are very responsive and helpful. Every request has been quickly responded to. The theme itself is really nice. I was adapting it for a slightly different industry and my client couldn't be happier. The animations are delightful and the attention to detail make all the difference. Great theme, great support! Thank you!!!
testimonials.author: marc-ee
